featured.name: Yuan 3.0 Ultra
featured.tagline: Trillion-parameter multimodal MoE foundation model with 68.8B activated parameters.
featured.why_radar: YuanLab's latest is properly massive but surprisingly efficient. A trillion total parameters with only 68.8B active at inference time shows MoE architectures are finally maturing. Open-source release means we can actually dig into how they're achieving 49% better training efficiency.

featured.name: LangWatch
featured.tagline: Open-source evaluation layer for AI agents with end-to-end tracing and systematic testing.
featured.why_radar: Finally, proper tooling for the non-deterministic nightmare that is agent development. LangWatch tackles the fundamental problem that you can't debug what you can't trace. This fills a massive gap in the agent development stack.

picks.name: MEM for Robots
picks.tagline: Multi-scale memory system giving Gemma 3-4B VLAs 15-minute context for complex tasks.
picks.why_radar: Physical Intelligence cracked the memory problem for robotic agents. Extending context to 15 minutes transforms what's possible for long-horizon tasks. This is how you get robots that can actually complete multi-step jobs without forgetting what they're doing.
